title: Dune
logline: When Duke Leto Atreides is granted control of the desert planet Arrakis and its valuable spice production, his son Paul must survive political betrayal and discover his destiny among the planet's native Fremen warriors.
antagonistOrConflict: Baron Harkonnen and the political machinations surrounding spice control
tone: Mythic and operatic, with moments of intimate character development

actBreaks.description: Duke Leto is betrayed and captured, marking the complete fall of House Atreides and forcing Paul and Jessica into exile.

validation.ruling: Dr. Yueh betrays Duke Leto by paralyzing him and revealing his bargain with the Harkonnens, fundamentally changing the story's direction and forcing Paul into exile - this irreversible betrayal ends Act 1.

actBreaks.description: Paul and Jessica are accepted by the Fremen after Paul defeats Jamis in ritual combat, completing their transformation from nobility to desert survivors.

validation.ruling: Paul and Jessica cross the desert using Fremen sandwalking techniques and narrowly escape a sandworm by reaching the rocks, completing their transformation from nobles to desert survivors and ending Act 2.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This script follows a classical hero's journey structure but inverts many expectations. Rather than building to a single climactic battle, it's structured as the first movement of a larger symphony - establishing Paul's world, destroying it completely, then rebuilding him within Fremen society. The pacing is deliberately methodical in the first act, taking time to establish the political complexity and Paul's initial abilities. The second act accelerates dramatically with the Harkonnen attack, then slows again as Paul and Jessica adapt to desert survival. The final act focuses on cultural integration rather than action, ending on a note of beginning rather than resolution.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script uses a patient build-up through scenes 1-75, then shifts into rapid-fire action from scenes 76-90 during the attack sequence. It returns to a more contemplative pace for the desert survival sequences (scenes 91-132), with the Fremen integration providing emotional rather than action-based momentum. The frequent location changes in the middle section create urgency, while the final sietch sequences allow for deeper character development.

incitingIncident.description: Stilgar, a Fremen leader, crosses the desert in a stillsuit and stands atop a rock formation surveying the dune sea.

validation.ruling: Scene #12 is too early setup without irreversible change. Scene #25 shows the Atreides arriving on Arrakis, shattering Paul's ordinary world on Caladan and forcing the family into the dangerous new environment that drives the entire plot forward.

midpoint.description: Jessica and Paul escape the sinking ornithopter with Yueh's hidden survival pack and reach firmer ground on a rock outcrop.

validation.ruling: Scene #89 is aftermath, not transformation. Scene #87 shows Paul's crucial shift from reactive victim to proactive killer when he uses the Voice and murders his captors - this is his point of no return where he cannot revert to being an innocent duke's son.

climax.description: Paul and Jessica reach a rocky basin with growing plants but find themselves surrounded by an entire Fremen tribe, with Stilgar recognizing Paul as the Duke's son while Jamis argues for taking their water, leading to Paul demonstrating his knowledge of Fremen ways and earning cautious acceptance.

validation.ruling: Scene #139 is exposition about water storage, not peak confrontation. Scene #133 shows Paul and Jessica surrounded by an entire Fremen tribe in a tense standoff where Paul must prove his knowledge of Fremen ways to survive - this is the highest-stakes confrontation that determines their fate.

scenes.heading: 1 BENE GESSERIT TEMPLE WALL 1 1
scenes.summary: A woman's voice narrates over an ancient mosaic about humanity's past enslavement by machines and the law forbidding artificial minds.

scenes.heading: 2 EXT. ARRAKIS ORBIT 2 2
scenes.summary: A stealth ship carrying a pilot and commando plunges through Arrakis' atmosphere like a falling star.

scenes.heading: 3 EXT. ARRAKIS - ROCK RIDGE - DAY 3 3
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho lands on Arrakis, strips off his gear, arms himself with weapons, and climbs out of sight across the desert ridge.

scenes.heading: 4 INT. CASTLE CALADAN - MEDITATION ROOM - NIGHT 4 4
scenes.summary: Lady Jessica sits in meditation, struggling to calm her emotions as her eyes dart beneath closed lids.

scenes.heading: 5 EXT. SPACE - CALADAN ORBIT 5 5
scenes.summary: A Guild Heighliner maneuvers over Caladan as a small shuttle emerges and falls toward the planet.

scenes.heading: 6 INT. CASTLE CALADAN - MEDITATION ROOM - NIGHT 6 6
scenes.summary: Jessica achieves stillness in meditation, her breathing stopping momentarily before thunder rumbles and her eyes open.

scenes.heading: 7 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - NIGHT 7 7
scenes.summary: Rain falls on Castle Caladan as the shuttle settles on the landing pad.

scenes.heading: 8 INT. CASTLE CALADAN - MEDITATION ROOM 8 8
scenes.summary: Jessica watches from her window as Reverend Mother Mohiam and four Bene Gesserit women descend from the shuttle.

scenes.heading: 9 INT. PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 9 9
scenes.summary: Paul dreams of a blue-eyed girl before Jessica wakes him, finding him confused and half-asleep.

scenes.heading: 10 LIBRARY 10 10
scenes.summary: Jessica leads Paul to meet Reverend Mother Mohiam in the library, where the old woman dismisses Jessica and prepares to test Paul alone.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul encounters the Bene Gesserit test that will determine his nature and future

scenes.heading: 11 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - TERRACE LANDING PAD - NIGHT 11 11
scenes.summary: Reverend Mother Mohiam berates Jessica for bearing a son instead of a daughter, warning that chaos and war will result from her disobedience.

scenes.heading: 12 INT. CASTLE CALADAN - PAUL’S STUDY - MORNING 12 12
scenes.summary: Paul studies holographic images of Arrakis and the Fremen while Thufir Hawat enters and discusses the impending move to the desert planet.

scenes.heading: 14 INT. TRAINING ROOM - DAY 14 14
scenes.summary: Gurney Halleck arrives with weapons for combat training as Paul watches servants packing family heirlooms for the move to Arrakis.

scenes.heading: 15 EXT. CALADAN CASTLE - PAVILION - DAY 15 15
scenes.summary: Paul and Gurney engage in sword combat training, with Paul demonstrating new techniques learned from Jessica.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. TRAINING ROOM - DAY 16 16
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul perform synchronized martial arts movements in a pavilion as rain drums on the roof.

scenes.heading: 17 EXT. CALADAN CASTLE - PAVILION - DAY 17 17
scenes.summary: Paul repeats the same movements in faster combat with Gurney, who parries and corners him.

scenes.heading: 18 INT. TRAINING ROOM - DAY 18 18
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul continue their graceful hand-to-hand sparring practice face to face.

scenes.heading: 19 EXT. SPACE - GIEDI PRIME 19 19
scenes.summary: Paul uses Jessica's techniques to get inside Gurney's guard, but Gurney reveals he has a dagger at Paul's groin.

scenes.heading: 20 EXT. HARKONNEN PALACE - DAY 20 20
scenes.summary: The gray world of Giedi Prime orbits a cold blue sun.

scenes.heading: 22 EXT. CASTLE CALADAN - DUCAL CEMETERY - DAY 22 22
scenes.summary: Beast Rabban arrives at the Harkonnen palace and meets with Baron Harkonnen, who floats above an ornate globe of Arrakis.

scenes.heading: EXT. CLIFFTOPS - SUNSET 22A
scenes.summary: Duke Leto and Paul stand in the family cemetery, discussing their ancestral roots and the necessity of leaving Caladan for Arrakis.

scenes.heading: INT. CASTLE CALADAN - LETO’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 22B
scenes.summary: Paul climbs alone to a clifftop promontory to watch his last sunset on Caladan, touching the soil of his birthplace.

scenes.heading: 23 EXT. CALADAN LANDING - DAY 23 23
scenes.summary: Leto and Jessica lie in bed as she expresses missing home and he pulls her into a passionate embrace.

scenes.heading: 24 EXT. ARRAKIS - DEEP DESERT - DAWN 24 24
scenes.summary: The Atreides family walks toward their flagship as the fleet prepares to depart Caladan for the Guild Heighliner.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Atreides leave their ancestral home for Arrakis, beginning their journey to destiny

scenes.heading: 25 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - DAY 25 25
scenes.summary: Stilgar, a Fremen leader, crosses the desert in a stillsuit and stands atop a rock formation surveying the dune sea.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. ATREIDES FLAGSHIP - BOARDING RAMP 26 26
scenes.summary: The Atreides flagship lands at Arrakeen spaceport as thousands of natives watch from behind barricades.

scenes.heading: 27 EXT. LANDING FIELD 27 27
scenes.summary: The Atreides family prepares to disembark, gasping at the blast-furnace heat as they squint in the alien sunlight.

scenes.heading: 28 ORNITHOPTER PAD 28 28
scenes.summary: Hawat's security forces deploy as Atreides legions march out and form up while Hawat greets the ducal family.

scenes.heading: 29 INT. ORNITHOPTER - CONTINUOUS 29 29
scenes.summary: Hawat leads Paul and Jessica to an ornithopter as crowds cheer and shout 'Lisan al-Gaib' while pointing at them.

scenes.heading: 31 EXT. ARRAKEEN - MAIN ROAD 31 31
scenes.summary: Jessica explains to Paul that the crowd's chanting refers to Bene Gesserit-planted legends as their ornithopter lifts off.

scenes.heading: 32 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DAY 32 32
scenes.summary: The Atreides legions march through Arrakeen in full battle armor as Leto leads them past a field of black crosses.

scenes.heading: 33 INT. RESIDENCY - GREAT HALL - DAY 33 33
scenes.summary: Crowds gather at the Residency gates as the ornithopter lands and Paul notices a porter with unnatural blue eyes.

scenes.heading: 34 NORTH WING - CORRIDOR 34 34
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica enter the massive Great Hall as porters and staff hurry about, with Paul staring at a man's blue-within-blue eyes.

scenes.heading: 37 DINING HALL 37 37
scenes.summary: Paul walks past a fresco of a sandworm and enters his new room, unpacking belongings while gazing at Arrakeen's skyline.

scenes.heading: 38 COMMAND TOWER 38 38
scenes.summary: Jessica interviews candidates for housekeeper as the women prostrate themselves, with Shadout Mapes explaining Harkonnen customs.

scenes.heading: 39 INT. PAUL’S ROOM - DAY 39 39
scenes.summary: Leto and Gurney survey Arrakeen from the command tower as Leto expresses doubt about his decision and worry about Duncan Idaho.

scenes.heading: 40 EXT. RESIDENCY - COMPOUND - DAY 40 40
scenes.summary: Paul studies holographic projections about spice and Arrakis life forms when something moves in the display, startling him.

scenes.heading: 41 INT. RESIDENCY - BASEMENT - DAY 41 41
scenes.summary: Hawat's security forces search the compound grounds with sonic probes, scanning for hidden threats.

scenes.heading: 42 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - COMMAND TOWER - NIGHT 42 42
scenes.summary: Hawat's troops discover a dead Harkonnen agent entombed in the basement wall with hunter-seeker equipment, having killed himself during discovery.

scenes.heading: INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - HAWAT’S OFFICE - DAY 42A
scenes.summary: Hawat offers his resignation to Leto for failing to detect the trap, but Leto angrily refuses and demands his continued service.

scenes.heading: INT. PITER’S OFFICE (GIEDI PRIME) - DAY
scenes.summary: Hawat analyzes data at his crucible while explaining to Paul how the attack served multiple strategic purposes for their enemies.

scenes.heading: INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - MEDITATION ROOM - DAY 42B
scenes.summary: Piter de Vries and Baron Harkonnen study their own strategic data, revealing how they're forcing the Atreides to spread their forces thin.

scenes.heading: 44 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - MEETING ROOM - MORNING 44 44
scenes.summary: Jessica teaches Paul about the Voice technique, explaining how to impose will without violence by reading psychological weaknesses.

scenes.heading: 45 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - HANGAR - DAY 45 45
scenes.summary: Paul attends his first staff meeting where Gurney reports on security while Leto discusses the challenges of spice production quotas.

scenes.heading: 46 INT. HANGAR - MINUTES LATER 46 46
scenes.summary: Hawat shows Leto and Paul a massive spice freighter that must be filled every twenty-five days, contrasting it with their meager current stockpile.

scenes.heading: 47 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BALCONY - DUSK 47 47
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho returns and briefs Leto's staff about living with the Fremen, revealing millions of hidden desert dwellers in underground sietches.
scenes.turningPointNote: Duncan's intelligence about the true Fremen population reveals a massive potential ally

scenes.heading: 48 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - AIRCRAFT BAY - MORNING 48 48
scenes.summary: Paul, Gurney, and Idaho share wine on a balcony as Idaho gives Paul a Fremen paracompass and describes their ingenious technology.

scenes.heading: 49 INT. ORNITHOPTER (GROUNDED) - CONTINUOUS 49 49
scenes.summary: Duke Leto and Paul meet Dr. Kynes, the Imperial Planetologist, who provides them with Fremen-made stillsuits for their desert expedition.

scenes.heading: 50 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - PAUL’S ROOM - DAY 50 50
scenes.summary: Kynes questions Leto's piloting ability as he takes control of the ornithopter, with Gurney defending the Duke's skills.

scenes.heading: 52 EXT. SPICE CRAWLER - CONTINUOUS 52 52
scenes.summary: Doctor Yueh reveals his tragic past to Jessica while Paul experiences a spice-induced vision of a Fremen army during a sandworm encounter.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's first major prescient vision reveals his future role leading the Fremen in holy war

scenes.heading: 53 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - AIRCRAFT BAY - DAY 53 53
scenes.summary: Duke Leto and Paul return from the desert rescue, with Leto warning Paul about taking risks and his responsibilities to House Atreides while Jessica embraces them both.

scenes.heading: 54 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - MEETING ROOM 54 54
scenes.summary: Duke Leto meets with his staff to plan a retaliatory strike against a Harkonnen spice stockpile on Giedi Prime, with his men eager to hit back at their enemies.

scenes.heading: EXT. SALUSA SECUNDUS - MILITARY SPACEPORT - DAY 55A
scenes.summary: On Salusa Secundus, thousands of Sardaukar warriors kneel at a massive military spaceport under Imperial flags, displaying their savage nature and bloodlust.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BALCONY - DAY
scenes.summary: Leto and Gurney observe Arrakeen natives leaving offerings at the Residency gates in gratitude for the desert rescue, with Gurney noting how the gesture reflects their respect for Leto.

scenes.heading: 56 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - LETO’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 56 56
scenes.summary: Doctor Yueh examines an exhausted Leto who hasn't slept in six days, giving him stimulants while Jessica watches with concern.

scenes.heading: 57 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - DAY 57 57
scenes.summary: Gurney watches spice being loaded into a freighter when a distant explosion and black smoke rise from within Arrakeen's city walls.

scenes.heading: 58 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - COMMAND TOWER - DAY 58 58
scenes.summary: In the command tower, a haggard Leto tells Paul about the Fremen being ten million strong and representing the real reason they walked into this trap.

scenes.heading: EXT. ARRAKEEN CITY WALLS - NIGHT 58A
scenes.summary: Atreides guards keep watch on the city walls with night-vision binoculars, scanning the quiet desert.

scenes.heading: 59 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - GREAT HALL - NIGHT 59 59
scenes.summary: The Atreides host a formal reception in the Great Hall, with Jessica identifying various guests including smugglers, water-shippers, and potential allies while assessing threats.

scenes.heading: 60 OMITTED 60 60
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 61 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - PAUL'S ROOM - NIGHT 61 61
scenes.summary: Paul wearily removes his formal uniform in his room while Doctor Yueh gives him a sleeping pill for recovery.

scenes.heading: 62 OMITTED 62 62
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 63 GREAT HALL 63 63
scenes.summary: After the reception, Gurney and Idaho share whiskey and toast their mission to tame Arrakis, clasping wrists as old friends and veterans.

scenes.heading: 64 INT. LETO’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 64 64
scenes.summary: Leto and Jessica lie in bed discussing the evening's revelations about enemies including Spacing Guild opposition and Harkonnen agents, before Jessica helps him sleep.

scenes.heading: 65 EXT. RESIDENCY - NIGHT 65 65
scenes.summary: The lights in the Residency windows go out one by one as the house shields shimmer in the moonlight.

scenes.heading: 66 INT. RESIDENCY - PAUL’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 66 66
scenes.summary: Paul dreams of the mysterious girl who calls him Usul and asks about the waters of his homeworld.

scenes.heading: 67 LETO'S BEDROOM - HOURS LATER 67 67
scenes.summary: Leto awakens anxiously and spots a flickering signal light on the distant Shield Wall cliffs through his window.

scenes.heading: 68 CORRIDOR 68 68
scenes.summary: Leto investigates the signal lights and discovers his security communications are jammed, then finds a wounded guard crawling on the floor.

scenes.heading: 69 SHIELD GENERATOR ROOM 69 69
scenes.summary: Leto races to the Shield Generator Room where Doctor Yueh shoots him with a specialized dart that penetrates his shield, paralyzing him.
scenes.turningPointNote: Yueh's betrayal is revealed as he drugs Leto, beginning the fall of House Atreides

scenes.heading: 70 EXT. RESIDENCY - NIGHT 70 70
scenes.summary: The Residency's shields shut off and Harkonnen dropships emerge from darkness, landing soldiers who race toward the house.

scenes.heading: 71 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - BARRACKS - NIGHT 71 71
scenes.summary: Gurney is awakened by a lieutenant reporting an unauthorized Guild Heighliner overhead, causing him to frown with concern.

scenes.heading: 72 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - NIGHT 72 72
scenes.summary: Gurney and his men witness a vast Harkonnen war fleet deploying from the Heighliner overhead, filling him with despair before the spaceport control tower explodes.

scenes.heading: 73 EXT. ARRAKIS ORBIT 73 73
scenes.summary: Harkonnen frigates shell Arrakis from orbit while thousands of Sardaukar in spacesuits jump from Imperial troopships, free-falling toward the planet's surface.

scenes.heading: 74 EXT. ARRAKEEN LANDING - NIGHT 74 74
scenes.summary: Gurney leads his vastly outnumbered men against landing Harkonnen soldiers and Sardaukar, killing one Sardaukar and taking his sword before charging into battle.

scenes.heading: 75 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - NIGHT 75 75
scenes.summary: Atreides house guards hold against Harkonnens until Sardaukar drop from the sky, overwhelming the defenders and breaking into the Residency.

scenes.heading: 76 SERVICE CORRIDOR 76 76
scenes.summary: Doctor Yueh explains to the paralyzed Leto that he betrayed House Atreides because the Harkonnens tortured his Bene Gesserit wife, while promising to help Paul escape.

scenes.heading: 77 DUNCAN IDAHO'S BEDROOM 77 77
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho awakens to sounds of battle, spots a Harkonnen soldier in the hallway, and kills him with a dagger to the throat.

scenes.heading: 78 HALLWAY 78 78
scenes.summary: Idaho encounters and kills a disguised Sardaukar in the hallway, with the enemy recognizing him by name before dying.

scenes.heading: 79 STAIRCASE 79 79
scenes.summary: Idaho battles two Sardaukar on a staircase, destroying their slow-darts with his sword before killing both enemies.

scenes.heading: 80 EXT. RESIDENCY - ROOFTOP - NIGHT 80 80
scenes.summary: Idaho reaches the rooftop and witnesses the massacre below, seeing Atreides soldiers being systematically beheaded by Sardaukar in the courtyard.

scenes.heading: 81 STREET - CONTINUOUS 81 81
scenes.summary: Idaho leaps from the roof, kills a Sardaukar, steals an ornithopter, and escapes under fire from the overwhelming enemy forces.

scenes.heading: 83 LETO'S BEDROOM - NIGHT 83 83
scenes.summary: Baron Harkonnen stands over the bound Jessica in Leto's bedroom, checking her restraints with his hands while she realizes Yueh's betrayal.

scenes.heading: 84 RESIDENCY CORRIDOR - MINUTES LATER 84 84
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul are placed on litters and transported through the Residency, with Paul secretly signaling to Jessica about their captors.

scenes.heading: 85 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - AIRCRAFT BAY - NIGHT 85 85
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul are loaded into an ornithopter by three troopers who plan to dump them in the desert for the worms to kill them.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) 86 86
scenes.summary: The ornithopter flies over the devastated Arrakeen while Jessica and Paul study their captors and the aircraft, shifting into heightened Bene Gesserit awareness.

scenes.heading: 87 EXT. SHIELD WALL - NIGHT 87 87
scenes.summary: The ornithopter passes over the Shield Wall into the desert, with Arrakeen Landing visible as burning wreckage in the distance.

scenes.heading: 88 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) - CONTINUOUS 88 88
scenes.summary: The troopers discuss assaulting Jessica while Paul uses the Voice to command them to remove his gag, then kills all three captors in the ensuing fight.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul successfully uses the Voice for the first time in combat, killing their captors and beginning their desert survival

scenes.heading: 89 EXT. DUST BASIN - NIGHT 89 89
scenes.summary: The unpiloted ornithopter settles into a dust basin on the desert floor, its skids sinking into the fine dust.

scenes.heading: 90 INT. ORNITHOPTER - CONTINUOUS 90 90
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul escape the sinking ornithopter with Yueh's hidden survival pack and reach firmer ground on a rock outcrop.

scenes.heading: 91 EXT. SAND DUNES - NIGHT 91 91
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica trek through the desert sand and set up a stilltent in the lee of a dune, using the wind to conceal it with drifting sand.

scenes.heading: 92 OMITTED 92 92
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 93 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - BALCONY 93 93
scenes.summary: Piter de Vries gloats to the captured Thufir Hawat about how the Harkonnens outmaneuvered the Atreides by thinking bigger about Arrakis's true value.

scenes.heading: 94 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DINING HALL - NIGHT 94 94
scenes.summary: Baron Harkonnen eats dinner at the head of the table while the naked, chained Duke Leto sits drugged at the far end, with violence raging outside.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. STILLTENT - DAWN 95 95
scenes.summary: Paul inventories their survival supplies in the stilltent and discovers Leto's signet ring hidden by Yueh, confirming his father's fate.

scenes.heading: EXT. STILLTENT - DAWN 95A
scenes.summary: Windblown sand completely covers and conceals the stilltent's exposed surface.

scenes.heading: INT. STILLTENT 95B
scenes.summary: Jessica grieves while Paul analytically processes their situation, experiencing spice visions and realizing this is an extermination with the Emperor's backing.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's prescient abilities fully awaken as he grasps the scope of the conspiracy and his emerging powers

scenes.heading: 96 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - DINING HALL - DAWN 96 96
scenes.summary: Duke Leto lies dead covered in white poison dust, surrounded by dozens of other bodies including Piter de Vries, while the Baron's body hangs from the ceiling.

scenes.heading: 97 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - COURTYARD - NIGHT 97 97
scenes.summary: The Baron survives in a decontamination cell while Rabban watches, and Kynes observes the Harkonnen fleet from her home before Idaho arrives seeking help.

scenes.heading: 99 INT. STILLTENT 99 99
scenes.summary: Jessica and Paul, dehydrated and haggard, remain hidden in their buried stilltent as Paul prepares to venture out with the sand compactor.

scenes.heading: 100 EXT. ARRAKIS DESERT - SUNSET 100 100
scenes.summary: Paul emerges from the buried stilltent at sunset, observes a desert mouse collecting moisture, then helps Jessica out as they prepare to continue their desert journey.

scenes.heading: 101 INT. IDAHO’S ORNITHOPTER - NIGHT 101 101
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica board Idaho's ornithopter where Dr. Kynes waits in the co-pilot seat, and Idaho grimly reports that Gurney fought hard but lost at Arrakeen Landing while the Harkonnens hit every population center simultaneously.

scenes.heading: 102 EXT. ROCKY PROMONTORY - DAWN 102 102
scenes.summary: Five ornithopters land on a rocky promontory where Fremen quickly camouflage them, and Kynes warns of an approaching storm visible as a column of darkness while the Fremen uncover a hidden door in the rock.

scenes.heading: INT. RESEARCH STATION - NEXUS - DAY 102A
scenes.summary: The group enters a huge circular research station chamber with a central stone pillar and passages leading to laboratories, where Kynes dismisses her Fremen escort to keep watch.

scenes.heading: 103 LABORATORY WING 103 103
scenes.summary: Kynes leads the group through laboratory facilities while ordering Fremen to find stillsuits and prepare coffee, as Paul observes the Fremen's unquestioning obedience to Kynes and Idaho cautiously prowls with hands on his weapons.

scenes.heading: 104 BOTANICAL LABORATORY 104 104
scenes.summary: Duncan Idaho wanders into a botanical laboratory containing desert-adapted plants growing in sand under glass domes, walking among them in wonder while keeping his hand on his sword-hilt.

scenes.heading: 105 OFFICE 105 105
scenes.summary: In Kynes' office, Paul asks her to bear witness that the Emperor moved against House Atreides, warning that the Sardaukar are picking off the Great Houses one by one, while Kynes explains that her testimony would cause general warfare and chaos across the Imperium.

scenes.heading: 106 CORRIDOR 106 106
scenes.summary: Twenty Sardaukar pour through the door after killing a Fremen guard, and Duncan Idaho draws his weapons and charges to meet them, accepting his death with wild joy.

scenes.heading: 107 OFFICE 107 107
scenes.summary: Paul opens the door to see Idaho fighting like a god of war against fifteen Sardaukar with five already dead at his feet, but Idaho receives three terrible wounds and falls dead as Paul draws his knife and charges forward with Jessica calling his name.
scenes.turningPointNote: Idaho's death eliminates Paul's protector and forces him into direct combat, marking the complete collapse of House Atreides' military protection.

scenes.heading: 108 PASSAGEWAY 108 108
scenes.summary: Kynes leads Paul and Jessica through a rock tunnel with glowtabs, directing them to a desert-rigged thopter while explaining the storm above five thousand meters is their best chance for survival, refusing to come because it only seats two.

scenes.heading: 109 HANGAR CAVERN - DAWN 109 109
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica enter a hangar cavern containing a small, older model ornithopter sitting in a pool of light, and they stow their equipment and climb into the delicate craft.

scenes.heading: 110 INT. ORNITHOPTER 110 110
scenes.summary: Paul pre-flights the ornithopter efficiently, pulls back on the collective, and launches the craft upward with a blast of jets and snapping wings.

scenes.heading: 111 EXT. ROCK SPIRE - DAY 111 111
scenes.summary: Kynes emerges from a rock spire in desert gear and watches wormsign closing in while Paul's ornithopter climbs toward the storm, as she prepares maker hooks and surveys the desert.

scenes.heading: 112 INT. ORNITHOPTER - DAY 112 112
scenes.summary: Paul pushes the ornithopter toward the massive sandstorm while three Harkonnen thopters pursue and fire missiles, forcing Paul to weave desperately as collision warnings sound and the missiles close fast despite his evasive maneuvers.

scenes.heading: 113 EXT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - NIGHT 113 113
scenes.summary: The Harkonnen Dreadnought hovers over the Atreides residency with Harkonnen guards stationed at every door in total control.

scenes.heading: 114 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - LETO’S BEDROOM - NIGHT 114 114
scenes.summary: Baron Harkonnen reclines in a tub of viscous black fluid with his cheek cracked from poison effects while two terrified teenage slaves tend to him, and Rabban enters to report that the female slave touched the Baron's cheek.

scenes.heading: 115 EXT. GIEDI PRIME ORBIT 115 115
scenes.summary: Five Atreides commandos led by Lanville cling to a stealth warship's gantry above Giedi Prime's gray world, and Lanville signals for them to let go and fall.

scenes.heading: 116 OMITTED 116 116
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 117 OMITTED 117 117
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 118 OMITTED 118 118
scenes.summary: Scene omitted.

scenes.heading: 119 STRATOSPHERE 119 119
scenes.summary: The Atreides commandos fall faster than sound through the thin upper atmosphere, steering like skydivers with heads-up displays guiding them toward their target far below.

scenes.heading: 120 EXT. HARKONNEN SPICE STOCKPILE - ROOFTOP - NIGHT 120 120
scenes.summary: The commandos land on a massive Harkonnen spice stockpile fortress as sirens sound and floodlights sweep, desperately assembling energy drills to bore through the concrete roof while protecting the machines with their shielded bodies from incoming projectiles.

scenes.heading: 121 INT. HARKONNEN SPICE STOCKPILE 121 121
scenes.summary: Energy drills break through the ceiling of the spice warehouse and drop gas cylinders that release white gas, which spreads through the climate-control systems and rapidly disintegrates the orange spice into gray dust.
scenes.turningPointNote: The destruction of the Harkonnen spice stockpile represents a major economic blow and the first successful Atreides counterstrike.

scenes.heading: 122 EXT. HARKONNEN SPICE STOCKPILE - ROOFTOP 122 122
scenes.summary: Lanville surrenders to Harkonnen guards after his men fall in combat, laughing as his wrist timer confirms the mission's success.

scenes.heading: 123 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - CORRIDOR - NIGHT 123 123
scenes.summary: Rabban backs out of Leto's bedroom as the Baron's hellish rage erupts with crashes and bellows, then cautiously returns to find the room splattered with black fluid, furniture destroyed, and the two slaves dead on the floor.

scenes.heading: 125 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) - DAY 125 125
scenes.summary: Paul fights to control the tumbling ornithopter with dead engines at 8000 meters as spice-laden dust fills the cockpit, and a spice vision overtakes him showing phantom lines of probability through the storm and a path to freedom.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul's first major spice vision marks his awakening to prescient abilities and supernatural guidance.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. DUST STORM - DAY 126 126
scenes.summary: The damaged ornithopter breaks out of the dust storm miles up with its glass scoured milky, wings bent and trembling, and engines choked with compacted dust, now functioning only as a glider.

scenes.heading: 127 INT. ORNITHOPTER (IN FLIGHT) 127 127
scenes.summary: Paul sees warning lights multiply across failing instrument panels as they descend silently, telling Jessica to run for the rocks as soon as they land while she braces against the fuselage.

scenes.heading: 128 EXT. DESERT - DAY 128 128
scenes.summary: The ornithopter crashes across the sand with breaking struts and crumpling wings, Paul and Jessica grab their gear and run toward rocks through deep sand, hearing a worm take the wreck behind them as they reach safety and change into stillsuits.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. ROCK RIDGE - DAY 129 129
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica work along a rocky ridge until it ends at a four-kilometer stretch of open sand, studying the paracompass and binoculars to spot greenery and potential people across the desert before deciding to cross at night.

scenes.heading: 130 INT. ARRAKEEN RESIDENCY - LETO’S BEDROOM - DAY 130 130
scenes.summary: Baron Harkonnen tells the captured Mentat Thufir Hawat that Lady Jessica was their inside agent, a Bene Gesserit serving her own schemes above House Atreides, leaving Hawat shocked and calling it impossible.
scenes.turningPointNote: The Baron's lie about Jessica being a traitor plants seeds of doubt that will fracture remaining Atreides loyalties.

scenes.heading: EXT. SHIELD WALL SUMMIT - SUNSET 130A
scenes.summary: Gurney Halleck leads seventy battered Atreides soldiers along the Shield Wall ridgetop to overlook a hidden settlement of smugglers and outlaws in a box canyon below.

scenes.heading: 131 EXT. ROCKY RIDGE - DUSK 131 131
scenes.summary: Jessica sets a thumper timer for thirty minutes at the sand's edge, and she and Paul cross the open desert using the erratic Fremen walking technique without rhythm, leaving strange tracks as the thumper begins pounding behind them.

scenes.heading: 132 ROCKY BASIN - NIGHT 132 132
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica reach a rocky basin with growing plants but find themselves surrounded by an entire Fremen tribe, with Stilgar recognizing Paul as the Duke's son while Jamis argues for taking their water, leading to Paul demonstrating his knowledge of Fremen ways and earning cautious acceptance.
scenes.turningPointNote: Paul and Jessica's encounter with the Fremen marks their transition from fugitives to potential tribal members and Paul's first step toward becoming Muad'Dib.

scenes.heading: 133 EXT. OPEN DESERT - NIGHT 133 133
scenes.summary: The Fremen tribe moves in single file through the desert with some whispering uneasily about the newcomers while Jamis grumbles, and Chani warns Paul not to brush against bushes that might leave threads showing their passage.

scenes.heading: 134 EXT. SLOT CANYON - DAWN 134 134
scenes.summary: As the sun rises, the tribe files into a narrow slot canyon that tightens until they must turn sideways, reaching a steel hatch leading into a sealed environment.

scenes.heading: 135 INT. CAVE OF RIDGES - DAY 135 135
scenes.summary: The tribe relaxes in a domed cave with banded stone walls as they remove their desert gear, while Paul and Jessica sit isolated watching Jamis foment anger among a group of Fremen across the cavern.

scenes.heading: 136 INT. SIETCH TABR - REVEREND MOTHER’S CHAPEL - DAY 136 136
scenes.summary: Stilgar enters an ornate chapel and kneels in reverence before Reverend Mother Ramallo, a 90-year-old holy woman who sits in a wooden throne, ancient and half-blind but smiling.

scenes.heading: 137 INT. CAVE OF RIDGES 137 137
scenes.summary: Jessica notices Fremen watching her with suspicion, desire, and worship until Stilgar appears and asks her to come see something he wants to show her.

scenes.heading: 138 CISTERN 138 138
scenes.summary: Stilgar leads Jessica into a dark cavern and reveals a massive water tank containing millions of gallons, explaining this holy water represents the Fremen dream to change Arrakis and that they have a thousand such hidden reservoirs.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation of the Fremen's vast water reserves and terraforming plan shows their true power and long-term vision for Arrakis.

scenes.heading: 139 INT. CAVE OF RIDGES 139 139
scenes.summary: Chani gives Paul spice-laden food while Stilgar asks the tribe about Jessica attempting the ritual, and Jessica raises her hand to recite Fremen religious passages from memory, causing collective gasps and mystified reverence as she demonstrates deep knowledge of their beliefs.
scenes.turningPointNote: Jessica's demonstration of Fremen religious knowledge establishes her credibility and sets up her path to becoming their Reverend Mother.

scenes.heading: 140 EXT. STONE BRIDGE - SUNSET 140 140
scenes.summary: Paul and Jessica walk across a stone bridge between locations as Paul worriedly asks about becoming a Reverend Mother, and Jessica explains it requires drinking a deadly poison that kills most women but grants higher awareness to survivors.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. SIETCH TABR - DAY 141 141
scenes.summary: The Fremen lead Paul and Jessica into the vast main cavern of Sietch Tabr with tiered balconies and glowglobes like constellations, while Chani takes Jessica away and the tribe changes from stillsuits into soft robes.

scenes.heading: 142 INT. REVEREND MOTHER’S CHAPEL 142 142
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 143 SIETCH TABR - MAIN CAVERN 143 143
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: INT. SIETCH TABR - DAY 143A
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 145 IN THE SIETCH 145 145
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 149 IN THE SIETCH 149 149
